texto: There's no thrilling anticipation of the day's first cup of coffee...nor the eye-closing delight of that first swallow of sauvignon blanc in the evening. texto: Pain is inevitable... Suffering is optional. We will all have to endure trauma and challenges. What matters is how we move forward afterward.
